title: SaverSpec (format version 1)
description: Declarative, agent-authorable screensaver: a static background plus layers of moving sprites. No code, no network, no strobe primitive — safety by construction. This schema is stricter than the runtime validator (unknown properties are rejected here to catch authoring typos; the runtime ignores them). Cross-field rules the schema cannot express: total entities across all layers must be <= 800; range pairs must satisfy min <= max.

schemaVersion.description: Format version. Independent of the npm package version.

seed.description: Deterministic RNG seed. Same spec + same seed = identical frames. Falls back to the host's seed.

units.description: Dimensional unit system. 'viewport' = all sizes/speeds/distances are fractions of min(w,h).

referenceViewport.description: Resolution the spec was designed at (default 1080). Entity counts density-scale above it.

ghosting.description: Frame persistence 0..0.95: each frame composites over a faded copy of the last, so moving entities smear (Mystify trails, long-exposure light). Flash-safe — only smooths luminance. Seeks stay deterministic via a fixed-step warm-up replay.

layers.description: Rendered back-to-front. At most 36 layers; at most 800 entities total.

speedRange.description: [min, max] px/sec, capped at 4000 so nothing teleports.

stops.description: Vertical gradient stops, top to bottom.

height.description: Band height in px (e.g. an aquarium seafloor).

period.description: Full cycle period in ms. Floor of 10 s.

amount.description: How far stops shift (fraction of 0..1 range). Default 0.15, max 0.3.

drift.description: Slow oscillation of gradient stop positions — makes the background feel alive.

count.description: Entities in this layer (max 400 per layer, 800 total).

size.description: Sprite size range in px (font size for emoji/text; ignored for circle).

wrap.description: Wrap to the opposite edge when leaving the viewport. Default true.

flip.description: Flip the sprite horizontally to face its heading. Default false.

blend.description: Compositing: 'lighter' = additive glow, 'screen' = gentle additive for pale backgrounds, 'multiply' = darkening (shadows). Omit for normal source-over.

region.description: Fractional spawn window (constrains placement, not travel). Default full viewport.

period.description: Breathing period in ms; floor of 500 (max 2 Hz — flash-safety).

angle.description: Propagation direction in degrees (0 = rightward). Default 0.

wave.description: Derive each entity's phase from its position: breathing becomes a traveling wave across the field (ripples, wind through grass). Neighbors are out of phase by construction — still flash-safe.

pulse.description: Sinusoidal opacity breathing. Per-entity seeded phase — a layer can never strobe in unison.

spin.description: Per-entity rotation speed in degrees/sec (positive = clockwise). Each entity gets a seeded starting angle.

amp.description: Size breathing amplitude as fraction of base size (0.3 = ±30%).

period.description: Breathing period in ms; same flash-safety floor as pulse.

grow.description: Sinusoidal size breathing. Per-entity seeded phase. Composes with any sprite kind.

key.description: Addressable name so setParam can use key.field paths.

position.description: Exact fractional position for a single entity. Requires count: 1. Overrides region scatter.

length.description: Trail duration in ms. How far back the afterglow extends.

fade.description: Opacity fade factor along the trail. 1 = full fade to 0 (default), 0 = uniform opacity.

trail.description: Afterglow trail behind moving entities. Sampled analytically — no state, fully deterministic.

k.description: Connect to the k nearest neighbors.

color.description: Link color. Defaults to per-entity color.

alpha.description: Link opacity. Defaults to entity alpha.

mode.description: 'nearest' (default) k-nearest within maxDist; 'chain' connects entities in order (Mystify polygons — ignores k/maxDist); 'random' a fixed deterministic wiring filtered by maxDist.

falloff.description: Fade link alpha with distance/maxDist — removes pop-in at the cutoff.

closed.description: Chain mode: join the last entity back to the first (closed polygon).

links.description: Draw lines between entities. The layer's entity count (count field) must be <= 200 for performance.

columns.description: Grid columns. Default: aspect-fit square-ish grid.

jitter.description: Seeded per-entity offset as a fraction of cell size (scalar or per-axis). { y: 1 } keeps columns crisp while scattering vertically (Matrix rain). Default 0.

layout.description: Place entities on a grid (row-major, within region) instead of random scatter — Matrix columns, LED walls, uniform dot fields.

enter.description: Layer fades in starting at this time (ms).

exit.description: Layer fades out starting at this time (ms). Must be > enter.

fade.description: Fade ramp duration in ms. Default 1000.

life.description: Layer lifecycle for act structure (stars first, dancers at t=3000). Pure function of t — deterministic and seekable.

soft.description: Radial falloff (glow orb) instead of a hard disc.

colors.description: Per-entity color palette (seeded pick). Falls back to color.

oneOf.description: Unfilled circle — bubbles, portals, sonar pings.
A line oriented along the entity's heading with a faded tail — rain that reads as rain, shooting stars, warp stars.
Axis-aligned rectangle (rotates with spin) — Mondrian blocks, confetti, city lights.

colorWeights.description: Relative weights for the colors[] pick, same length as colors. At least one weight must be > 0. 'Mostly cool tones, occasional ember' without duplicating entries.

period.description: Cycling period in ms; floor of 500 (flash-safety).

cycle.description: Rotate through sprite variants over time. Each entity offsets by its seeded phase.

angle.description: Heading in degrees: 0 = right, 90 = down. Default 0.

bidirectional.description: Randomly flip horizontal direction per entity (fish).

type.description: Entity stays exactly where placed. Use with position for pinned elements.

speed.description: [min, max] angular velocity in degrees/sec, capped at 180.

layer.description: Key of a count-1 parent layer to orbit (moons around a wandering planet). One level deep only — the parent may not itself orbit a layer.

center.description: Orbit center: fractional viewport position (default {0.5, 0.5}) or { layer: key } to orbit a single-entity parent layer.

angle.description: Base heading in degrees. Omit for a seeded heading per entity.

meander.description: Harmonic amplitude (px or viewport-units). Default ~0.05 viewport-units. How far paths curve away from the base line.

coherence.description: 0 = each entity wanders independently; 1 = the whole layer undulates in unison (fake flocking). Default 0.

oneOf.description: Organic harmonic drift — base velocity plus 3 seeded sine octaves per axis. Flowing curved paths (Flurry streams, aurora, jellyfish) with zero simulation state.

speed.description: [min, max] depth-units/sec (1 = full near-to-far span per second), capped at 1.5.

center.description: Vanishing point as fractional viewport position. Default {0.5, 0.5}.

oneOf.description: Perspective starfield: entities stream toward the viewer along a depth axis, size and alpha scaling with 1/z. Pair with streak sprites for the classic warp tunnel.

duration.description: Time for one full lap in ms (min 2000).

curve.description: 'smooth' (default) = Catmull-Rom spline through the points; 'linear' = straight segments.

closed.description: Loop the path (default true). Open paths ping-pong.

scatter.description: Seeded per-entity offset (px or viewport-units) so entities sharing a path don't stack.

oneOf.description: Choreographed spline motion — figure-eights, sweeping arcs, patrol routes. Each entity gets a seeded phase offset along the path.
